```{r}
df_jaccard_DenHaag_mean <- cbind(X_summary_DenHaag,Y_summary_DenHaag[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_DenHaag_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard DenHaag") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_DenHaag_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_DenHaag <- phyloseq::distance(phy_DenHaag, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ topology, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_topology_DenHaag)
adonis_streetname_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ streetname, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_streetname_DenHaag)
adonis_covering_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ covering, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_covering_DenHaag)
adonis_typestraat_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ type_street, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_typestraat_DenHaag)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_DenHaag <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta_DenHaag$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_DenHaag
PairPermS16_DenHaag$F.value
streetname_pairwise_DenHaag <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta_DenHaag$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_DenHaag

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_DenHaag <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_DenHaag$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_DenHaag$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_DenHaag$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_DenHaag$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_DenHaag, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_DenHaag.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="DenHaag"))
```

### Leiden

```{r}
phy_Leiden <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Leiden")
meta_Leiden <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Leiden")

#PCOA Jaccard Leiden-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Leiden <- ordinate(phy_Leiden, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Leiden <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Leiden$vectors[,1:2], meta_Leiden, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Leiden) <- df_jaccard_Leiden$Row.names
df_jaccard_Leiden <- df_jaccard_Leiden[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Leiden, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Leiden") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Leiden.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Leiden <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Leiden, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Leiden <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Leiden, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Leiden_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Leiden,Y_summary_Leiden[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Leiden_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Leiden_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Leiden") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Leiden_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Leiden <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Leiden, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ topology, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_topology_Leiden)
adonis_streetname_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ streetname, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_streetname_Leiden)
adonis_covering_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ covering, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_covering_Leiden)
adonis_typestraat_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ type_street, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_typestraat_Leiden)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Leiden <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta_Leiden$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Leiden
PairPermS16_Leiden$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Leiden <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta_Leiden$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Leiden

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Leiden <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Leiden$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Leiden$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_Leiden$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_Leiden$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Leiden, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Leiden.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Leiden"))
```

### Tilburg

```{r}
phy_Tilburg <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Tilburg")
meta_Tilburg <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Tilburg")

#PCOA Jaccard Tilburg-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg <- ordinate(phy_Tilburg, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Tilburg <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg$vectors[,1:2], meta_Tilburg, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Tilburg) <- df_jaccard_Tilburg$Row.names
df_jaccard_Tilburg <- df_jaccard_Tilburg[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Tilburg, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Tilburg") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C","#FFFFCC")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Tilburg.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Tilburg <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Tilburg, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Tilburg <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Tilburg, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Tilburg_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Tilburg,Y_summary_Tilburg[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Tilburg_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Tilburg") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C","#FFFFCC")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Tilburg_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Tilburg <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Tilburg, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ topology, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_topology_Tilburg)
adonis_streetname_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ streetname, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_streetname_Tilburg)
adonis_covering_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ covering, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_covering_Tilburg)
adonis_typestraat_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ type_street, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_typestraat_Tilburg)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Tilburg <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta_Tilburg$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Tilburg
PairPermS16_Tilburg$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Tilburg <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta_Tilburg$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Tilburg

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Tilburg <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_Tilburg),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Tilburg$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Tilburg$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Tilburg),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_Tilburg),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_Tilburg),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_Tilburg$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_Tilburg$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Tilburg, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Tilburg.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Tilburg"))
```

## S16 PCoA per topology

### Treepit

```{r}
phy_Treepit <- subset_samples(phy_rare, topology=="Tree pit")
meta_Treepit <- subset(enriched_meta, topology == "Tree pit")

#PCOA Jaccard Treepit-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Treepit <- ordinate(phy_Treepit, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Treepit <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Treepit$vectors[,1:2], meta_Treepit, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Treepit) <- df_jaccard_Treepit$Row.names
df_jaccard_Treepit <- df_jaccard_Treepit[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Treepit <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Treepit, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=city, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Treepit$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Treepit$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Treepit") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Treepit
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Treepit.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Treepit <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Treepit, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Treepit <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Treepit, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Treepit_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Treepit,Y_summary_Treepit[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Treepit_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Treepit_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=city, shape = city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Treepit$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Treepit$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Treepit") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Treepit_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Treepit_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Treepit <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Treepit, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city_Treepit <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Treepit ~ city, data= meta_Treepit)
print(adonis_city_Treepit)
adonis_streetname_Treepit <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Treepit ~ streetname, data= meta_Treepit)
print(adonis_streetname_Treepit)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Treepit, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Treepit <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Treepit, meta_Treepit$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Treepit
PairPermS16_Treepit$F.value


## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Treepit <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_city_Treepit),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Treepit$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Treepit$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Treepit),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Treepit, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Treepit.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Treepit"))
```

### sidewalk with trees

```{r}
phy_Sidewalk_with_trees <- subset_samples(phy_rare, topology=="sidewalk with trees")
meta_Sidewalk_with_trees <- subset(enriched_meta, topology == "sidewalk with trees")

#PCOA Jaccard Sidewalk_with_trees-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees <- ordinate(phy_Sidewalk_with_trees, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees$vectors[,1:2], meta_Sidewalk_with_trees, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees) <- df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees$Row.names
df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees <- df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_with_trees <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=city, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Sidewalk_with_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_with_trees
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Sidewalk_with_trees.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Sidewalk_with_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Sidewalk_with_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Sidewalk_with_trees,Y_summary_Sidewalk_with_trees[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_with_trees_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_with_trees_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=city, shape = city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Sidewalk_with_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_with_trees_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Sidewalk_with_trees_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_with_trees <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Sidewalk_with_trees, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city_Sidewalk_with_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_with_trees ~ city, data= meta_Sidewalk_with_trees)
print(adonis_city_Sidewalk_with_trees)
adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_with_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_with_trees ~ streetname, data= meta_Sidewalk_with_trees)
print(adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_with_trees)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_with_trees, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Sidewalk_with_trees <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_with_trees, meta_Sidewalk_with_trees$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Sidewalk_with_trees
PairPermS16_Sidewalk_with_trees$F.value


## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Sidewalk_with_trees <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_city_Sidewalk_with_trees),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Sidewalk_with_trees$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Sidewalk_with_trees$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_with_trees),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Sidewalk_with_trees, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Sidewalk_with_trees.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Sidewalk_with_trees"))

```

### Street_with_trees

```{r}
phy_Street_with_trees <- subset_samples(phy_rare, topology=="street with trees")
meta_Street_with_trees <- subset(enriched_meta, topology == "street with trees")

#PCOA Jaccard Street_with_trees-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees <- ordinate(phy_Street_with_trees, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Street_with_trees <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees$vectors[,1:2], meta_Street_with_trees, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Street_with_trees) <- df_jaccard_Street_with_trees$Row.names
df_jaccard_Street_with_trees <- df_jaccard_Street_with_trees[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Street_with_trees <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Street_with_trees, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=city, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Street_with_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Street_with_trees
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Street_with_trees.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Street_with_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Street_with_trees, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Street_with_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Street_with_trees, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Street_with_trees_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Street_with_trees,Y_summary_Street_with_trees[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Street_with_trees_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Street_with_trees_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=city, shape = city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_with_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Street_with_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Street_with_trees_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Street_with_trees_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Street_with_trees <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Street_with_trees, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city_Street_with_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Street_with_trees ~ city, data= meta_Street_with_trees)
print(adonis_city_Street_with_trees)
adonis_streetname_Street_with_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Street_with_trees ~ streetname, data= meta_Street_with_trees)
print(adonis_streetname_Street_with_trees)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Street_with_trees, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Street_with_trees <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Street_with_trees, meta_Street_with_trees$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Street_with_trees
PairPermS16_Street_with_trees$F.value


## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Street_with_trees <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_city_Street_with_trees),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Street_with_trees$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Street_with_trees$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Street_with_trees),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Street_with_trees, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Street_with_trees.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Street_with_trees"))

```

### Street without trees

```{r}
phy_Street_without_trees <- subset_samples(phy_rare, topology=="street without trees")
meta_Street_without_trees <- subset(enriched_meta, topology == "street without trees")

#PCOA Jaccard Street_without_trees-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees <- ordinate(phy_Street_without_trees, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Street_without_trees <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees$vectors[,1:2], meta_Street_without_trees, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Street_without_trees) <- df_jaccard_Street_without_trees$Row.names
df_jaccard_Street_without_trees <- df_jaccard_Street_without_trees[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Street_without_trees <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Street_without_trees, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=city, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Street_without_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Street_without_trees
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Street_without_trees.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Street_without_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Street_without_trees, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Street_without_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Street_without_trees, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Street_without_trees_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Street_without_trees,Y_summary_Street_without_trees[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Street_without_trees_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Street_without_trees_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=city, shape = city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Street_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Street_without_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Street_without_trees_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Street_without_trees_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Street_without_trees <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Street_without_trees, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city_Street_without_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Street_without_trees ~ city, data= meta_Street_without_trees)
print(adonis_city_Street_without_trees)
adonis_streetname_Street_without_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Street_without_trees ~ streetname, data= meta_Street_without_trees)
print(adonis_streetname_Street_without_trees)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Street_without_trees, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Street_without_trees <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Street_without_trees, meta_Street_without_trees$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Street_without_trees
PairPermS16_Street_without_trees$F.value


## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Street_without_trees <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_city_Street_without_trees),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Street_without_trees$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Street_without_trees$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Street_without_trees),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Street_without_trees, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Street_without_trees.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Street_without_trees"))

```

### Sidewalk without trees

```{r}
phy_Sidewalk_without_trees <- subset_samples(phy_rare, topology=="sidewalk without trees")
meta_Sidewalk_without_trees <- subset(enriched_meta, topology == "sidewalk without trees")

#PCOA Jaccard Sidewalk_without_trees-------------
S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees <- ordinate(phy_Sidewalk_without_trees, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees <- merge(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees$vectors[,1:2], meta_Sidewalk_without_trees, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees) <- df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees$Row.names
df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees <- df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_without_trees <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=city, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Sidewalk_without_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_without_trees
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Sidewalk_without_trees.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Sidewalk_without_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Sidewalk_without_trees <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Sidewalk_without_trees,Y_summary_Sidewalk_without_trees[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_without_trees_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Sidewalk_without_trees_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=city, shape = city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(S16_ordin_jac_Sidewalk_without_trees$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Sidewalk_without_trees") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Sidewalk_without_trees_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/PCOA_Sidewalk_without_trees_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_without_trees <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Sidewalk_without_trees, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city_Sidewalk_without_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_without_trees ~ city, data= meta_Sidewalk_without_trees)
print(adonis_city_Sidewalk_without_trees)
adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_without_trees <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_without_trees ~ streetname, data= meta_Sidewalk_without_trees)
print(adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_without_trees)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_without_trees, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermS16_Sidewalk_without_trees <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Sidewalk_without_trees, meta_Sidewalk_without_trees$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermS16_Sidewalk_without_trees
PairPermS16_Sidewalk_without_trees$F.value


## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Sidewalk_without_trees <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_city_Sidewalk_without_trees),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermS16_Sidewalk_without_trees$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermS16_Sidewalk_without_trees$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Sidewalk_without_trees),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Sidewalk_without_trees, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/16S-Sjoerd/pcoa/statistical_summary_Sidewalk_without_trees.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Sidewalk_without_trees"))

```

## ITS PCoA

```{r}
library(doBy)
library(ggplot2)
library(vegan)
library(phyloseq)
enriched_meta <- read.csv("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/meta_11912_ITS_alpha.csv", row.names = 1)
enriched_meta$covertree <- paste(enriched_meta$type_straat, enriched_meta$bedekking)

#PCOA Bray all-------------
ITS_ordin_jac <- ordinate(phy_rare, method = "PCoA", distance = "bray")


df_bray_comall_jac <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac$vectors[,1:2], enriched_meta, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_bray_comall_jac) <- df_bray_comall_jac$Row.names
df_bray_comall_jac <- df_bray_comall_jac[, -1] 


str(df_bray_comall_jac)


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15, face ="bold"),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth = 2)) 

pcoa_bray_all <- ggplot(df_bray_comall_jac, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=topology, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Bray") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('#FFABAB', '#ACE7FF', '#DBFFD6', '#ECD4FF', '#FEECC8')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all
#ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_NO_ERROR_BRAY.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#No I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+topology, data=df_bray_comall_jac, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+topology, data=df_bray_comall_jac, FUN=dstats)
df_bray_comall_jac_mean <- cbind(X_summary,Y_summary[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_mean <- ggplot(df_bray_comall_jac_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=topology, shape=city)) +
  #facet_grid(.~city, scales="free_x") +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se), linewidth=.7) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se), linewidth=.7) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7, stroke = 1)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Bray") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('#FFABAB', '#ACE7FF', '#DBFFD6', '#ECD4FF', '#FEECC8')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_error_bars_BRAY_NoCross.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

```

In ITS there are some outliers, so I want to export the df with coordinates to check which one they are

```{r}
write.csv(df_bray_comall_jac, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/ITS_PCoA_coordinates_BRAY.csv")
```

All outliers are in three streets in The Hague. I've decided to remove them from my data for a little test .

```{r}
#filter phyloseq
physeq_filtered <- subset_samples(phy_rare, !grepl("^H9|^H7|^H6BS1|^H6BS2", sample_names(phy_rare)))
#filter metadata
filtered_enriched_meta  <- enriched_meta[!grepl("^H9|^H7|^H6BS1|^H6BS2", rownames(enriched_meta)), ]
## Repeat ordination
filtered_ITS_ordin_jac <- ordinate(physeq_filtered, method = "PCoA", distance = "bray")

#Clean df
filtered_bray_comall_jac <- merge(filtered_ITS_ordin_jac$vectors[,1:2], filtered_enriched_meta, by = "row.names")
row.names(filtered_bray_comall_jac) <- filtered_bray_comall_jac$Row.names
filtered_bray_comall_jac <- filtered_bray_comall_jac[, -1] 

## Now make a new graph
pcoa_bray_all_filt <- ggplot(filtered_bray_comall_jac, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=topology, shape=city)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(filtered_ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(filtered_ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Bray") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('#FFABAB', '#ACE7FF', '#DBFFD6', '#ECD4FF', '#FEECC8')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_filt
 ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_NO_ERROR_outliers_rem_BRAY.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
 
 
 #Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary <- summaryBy(Axis.1~city+topology, data=filtered_bray_comall_jac, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary <- summaryBy(Axis.2~city+topology, data=filtered_bray_comall_jac, FUN=dstats)
df_bray_comall_jac_mean <- cbind(X_summary,Y_summary[,3:6])
 ## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_mean <- ggplot(df_bray_comall_jac_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=topology, shape=city)) +
  #facet_grid(.~city, scales="free_x") +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Bray") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c('#FFABAB', '#ACE7FF', '#DBFFD6', '#ECD4FF', '#FEECC8')) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_nooutliers_error_bars_Bray.png",width = 25, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)
```

### Statistics beta - Permanova

To make check statistical relationships, it's time to do a test

```{r}
library(RVAideMemoire)
# Calculate Bray-Curtis distance matrix
#jaccard_dist <- phyloseq::distance(phy_rare, method = "bray")
#enriched_meta <- as.data.frame(enriched_meta)
# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ city, data=enriched_meta)
adonis_city
adonis_topology <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ topology, data= enriched_meta)
adonis_topology
adonis_streetname <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ streetname, data= enriched_meta)
adonis_streetname
adonis_covering <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ bedekking, data= enriched_meta)
adonis_covering
adonis_typestraat <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ type_straat, data= enriched_meta)
adonis_covering
adonis_covertree <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ covertree, data = enriched_meta)
adonis_covertree
###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

# PERMANOVA for interaction (combination)
adonis_combination <- adonis2(jaccard_dist ~ group, data =enriched_meta)

PairPermITS <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist, enriched_meta$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS
PairPermITS$F.value

pairpermits2 <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist, enriched_meta$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
pairpermits2
pairpermits2$F.value

pairperm_covertree <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist, enriched_meta$covertree, test = "pillai", nperm =999, p.method ="fdr", F=T, R2=T)
pairperm_covertree$R2.value

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is alrger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results

# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology),
  data.frame(Test="Pairwise_permanova_topology", pairpermits2$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_topology_R2", pairpermits2$R2.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_city", adonis_city),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_city", PairPermITS$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "R2_value_city", PairPermITS$R2.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covertree", adonis_covertree),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_covertree", pairperm_covertree$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "R2_covertree", pairperm_covertree$R2.value),
  .id = "Source"
)


write.csv(combined_results, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_BRAY.csv")




```

```         
Permutation test for adonis under reduced model Permutation: free Number of permutations:  999  adonis2(formula = bray_dist ~ enriched_meta$city)           Df SumOfSqs      R2      F Pr(>F)     Model      4    5.448 0.02573 2.9576  0.001 *** Residual 448  206.315 0.97427                   Total    452  211.763 1.00000                   --- Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1 Permutation test for adonis under reduced model Permutation: free Number of permutations: 999  adonis2(formula = bray_dist ~ enriched_meta$topology)           Df SumOfSqs      R2      F Pr(>F)     Model      4    9.391 0.04435 5.1971  0.001 *** Residual 448  202.373 0.95565                   Total    452  211.763 1.00000                   --- Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1 Permutation test for adonis under reduced model Permutation: free Number of permutations: 999  adonis2(formula = bray_dist ~ enriched_meta$group)           Df SumOfSqs      R2      F Pr(>F)     Model     24   24.613 0.11623 2.3454  0.001 *** Residual 428  187.150 0.88377                   Total    452  211.763 1.00000                   --- Signif. codes:  0 ‘***’ 0.001 ‘**’ 0.01 ‘*’ 0.05 ‘.’ 0.1 ‘ ’ 1
```

And the same statistics, but than without outliers

```{r}
# Calculate Bray-Curtis distance matrix
bray_dist <- phyloseq::distance(physeq_filtered, method = "bray")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_city <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ city, data=filtered_enriched_meta)
adonis_topology <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ topology, data= filtered_enriched_meta)

###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

# PERMANOVA for interaction (combination)
adonis_combination <- adonis2(bray_dist ~ group, data =filtered_enriched_meta)

PairPermITS <- pairwise.perm.manova(bray_dist, filtered_enriched_meta$city, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS
PairPermITS$F.value

pairpermits2 <- pairwise.perm.manova(bray_dist, filtered_enriched_meta$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
pairpermits2
pairpermits2$F.value
## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is alrger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results
print(adonis_city)
print(adonis_topology)
print(adonis_combination)

combined_results <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_city", PairPermITS$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_city", PairPermITS$F.value),
  data.frame(Test="Pairwise_permanova_topology", pairpermits2$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat),
  .id = "Source"
)


write.csv(combined_results, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_NO_OUTLIERS_BRAY.csv")

```

## ITS PCoA per city

### Amsterdam

```{r}
phy_Amsterdam <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Amsterdam")
meta_Amsterdam <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Amsterdam")

#PCOA Jaccard Amsterdam-------------
ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam <- ordinate(phy_Amsterdam, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Amsterdam <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam$vectors[,1:2], meta_Amsterdam, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Amsterdam) <- df_jaccard_Amsterdam$Row.names
df_jaccard_Amsterdam <- df_jaccard_Amsterdam[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Amsterdam <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Amsterdam, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Amsterdam") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Amsterdam
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Amsterdam.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Amsterdam <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Amsterdam, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Amsterdam <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Amsterdam, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Amsterdam_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Amsterdam,Y_summary_Amsterdam[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Amsterdam_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Amsterdam_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Amsterdam$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Amsterdam") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Amsterdam_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Amsterdam_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Amsterdam <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Amsterdam, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Amsterdam <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam ~ topology, data= meta_Amsterdam)
print(adonis_topology_Amsterdam)
adonis_streetname_Amsterdam <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam ~ streetname, data= meta_Amsterdam)
print(adonis_streetname_Amsterdam)
adonis_covering_Amsterdam <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam ~ bedekking, data= meta_Amsterdam)
print(adonis_covering_Amsterdam)
adonis_typestraat_Amsterdam <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam ~ type_straat, data= meta_Amsterdam)
print(adonis_typestraat_Amsterdam)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermITS_Amsterdam <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam, meta_Amsterdam$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS_Amsterdam
PairPermITS_Amsterdam$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Amsterdam <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Amsterdam, meta_Amsterdam$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Amsterdam

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Amsterdam <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_Amsterdam),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermITS_Amsterdam$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermITS_Amsterdam$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Amsterdam),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_Amsterdam),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_Amsterdam),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_Amsterdam$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_Amsterdam$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Amsterdam, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_Amsterdam.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Amsterdam"))
```

### Dordrecht

```{r}
phy_Dordrecht <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Dordrecht")
meta_Dordrecht <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Dordrecht")

#PCOA Jaccard Dordrecht-------------
ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht <- ordinate(phy_Dordrecht, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Dordrecht <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht$vectors[,1:2], meta_Dordrecht, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Dordrecht) <- df_jaccard_Dordrecht$Row.names
df_jaccard_Dordrecht <- df_jaccard_Dordrecht[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Dordrecht <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Dordrecht, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Dordrecht") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Dordrecht
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Dordrecht.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Dordrecht <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Dordrecht, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Dordrecht <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Dordrecht, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Dordrecht_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Dordrecht,Y_summary_Dordrecht[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Dordrecht_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Dordrecht_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Dordrecht$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Dordrecht") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Dordrecht_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Dordrecht_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Dordrecht <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Dordrecht, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Dordrecht <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht ~ topology, data= meta_Dordrecht)
print(adonis_topology_Dordrecht)
adonis_streetname_Dordrecht <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht ~ streetname, data= meta_Dordrecht)
print(adonis_streetname_Dordrecht)
adonis_covering_Dordrecht <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht ~ bedekking, data= meta_Dordrecht)
print(adonis_covering_Dordrecht)
adonis_typestraat_Dordrecht <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht ~ type_straat, data= meta_Dordrecht)
print(adonis_typestraat_Dordrecht)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermITS_Dordrecht <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht, meta_Dordrecht$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS_Dordrecht
PairPermITS_Dordrecht$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Dordrecht <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Dordrecht, meta_Dordrecht$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Dordrecht

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Dordrecht <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_Dordrecht),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermITS_Dordrecht$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermITS_Dordrecht$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Dordrecht),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_Dordrecht),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_Dordrecht),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_Dordrecht$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_Dordrecht$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Dordrecht, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_Dordrecht.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Dordrecht"))
```

### Den Haag

```{r}
phy_DenHaag <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="DenHaag")
meta_DenHaag <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "DenHaag")

#PCOA Jaccard DenHaag-------------
ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag <- ordinate(phy_DenHaag, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_DenHaag <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag$vectors[,1:2], meta_DenHaag, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_DenHaag) <- df_jaccard_DenHaag$Row.names
df_jaccard_DenHaag <- df_jaccard_DenHaag[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag <- ggplot(df_jaccard_DenHaag, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard DenHaag") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_DenHaag.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_DenHaag <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_DenHaag, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_DenHaag <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_DenHaag, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_DenHaag_mean <- cbind(X_summary_DenHaag,Y_summary_DenHaag[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_DenHaag_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_DenHaag$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard DenHaag") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_DenHaag_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_DenHaag_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_DenHaag <- phyloseq::distance(phy_DenHaag, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ topology, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_topology_DenHaag)
adonis_streetname_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ streetname, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_streetname_DenHaag)
adonis_covering_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ bedekking, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_covering_DenHaag)
adonis_typestraat_DenHaag <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_DenHaag ~ type_straat, data= meta_DenHaag)
print(adonis_typestraat_DenHaag)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermITS_DenHaag <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta_DenHaag$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS_DenHaag
PairPermITS_DenHaag$F.value
streetname_pairwise_DenHaag <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_DenHaag, meta_DenHaag$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_DenHaag

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_DenHaag <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermITS_DenHaag$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermITS_DenHaag$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_DenHaag),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_DenHaag$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_DenHaag$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_DenHaag, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_DenHaag.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="DenHaag"))
```

### Leiden

```{r}
phy_Leiden <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Leiden")
meta_Leiden <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Leiden")

#PCOA Jaccard Leiden-------------
ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden <- ordinate(phy_Leiden, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Leiden <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden$vectors[,1:2], meta_Leiden, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Leiden) <- df_jaccard_Leiden$Row.names
df_jaccard_Leiden <- df_jaccard_Leiden[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Leiden, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Leiden") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Leiden.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Leiden <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Leiden, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Leiden <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Leiden, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Leiden_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Leiden,Y_summary_Leiden[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Leiden_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Leiden_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Leiden$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Leiden") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Leiden_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Leiden_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Leiden <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Leiden, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ topology, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_topology_Leiden)
adonis_streetname_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ streetname, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_streetname_Leiden)
adonis_covering_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ bedekking, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_covering_Leiden)
adonis_typestraat_Leiden <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Leiden ~ type_straat, data= meta_Leiden)
print(adonis_typestraat_Leiden)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermITS_Leiden <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta_Leiden$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS_Leiden
PairPermITS_Leiden$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Leiden <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Leiden, meta_Leiden$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Leiden

## For pairwase manova:
# higher F-value means that between-group variation is larger relative to the within group variation
# This generally means a stronger effect of the grouping variable
# Display results


# Flatten and bind rows
combined_results_Leiden <- bind_rows(
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_topology", adonis_topology_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_permanova_topology", PairPermITS_Leiden$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value_topology", PairPermITS_Leiden$F.value),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_streetname", adonis_streetname_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_covering", adonis_covering_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Adonis_typestreet", adonis_typestraat_Leiden),
  data.frame(Test = "Pairwise_streetname", streetname_pairwise_Leiden$p.value),
  data.frame(Test = "F_value", streetname_pairwise_Leiden$F.value),
  .id = "Source"
)
write.csv(combined_results_Leiden, "G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/statistical_summary_Leiden.csv")

rm(list=ls(pattern="Leiden"))
```

### Tilburg

```{r}
phy_Tilburg <- subset_samples(phy_rare, city=="Tilburg")
meta_Tilburg <- subset(enriched_meta, city == "Tilburg")

#PCOA Jaccard Tilburg-------------
ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg <- ordinate(phy_Tilburg, method = "PCoA", distance = "jaccard")


df_jaccard_Tilburg <- merge(ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg$vectors[,1:2], meta_Tilburg, by = "row.names")
row.names(df_jaccard_Tilburg) <- df_jaccard_Tilburg$Row.names
df_jaccard_Tilburg <- df_jaccard_Tilburg[, -1] 


mytheme <- theme_bw()+
  theme(text = element_text(size=15),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.placement = "outside",
        legend.box.background = element_rect(),
        legend.box.margin = margin(1, 1, 1, 1),
        legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(), 
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank()) 

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Tilburg, aes(Axis.1,Axis.2, fill=streetname, shape=topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Tilburg") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C","#FFFFCC")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Tilburg.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

#Now I want to add error-bars
dstats <- function(x)(c(n=length(x), mean=mean(x), sd=sd(x), se=sd(x)/sqrt(length(x))))
X_summary_Tilburg <- summaryBy(Axis.1~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Tilburg, FUN=dstats)
Y_summary_Tilburg <- summaryBy(Axis.2~topology+streetname, data=df_jaccard_Tilburg, FUN=dstats)
df_jaccard_Tilburg_mean <- cbind(X_summary_Tilburg,Y_summary_Tilburg[,3:6])

## And one with Error bars
pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg_mean <- ggplot(df_jaccard_Tilburg_mean, aes(Axis.1.mean,Axis.2.mean, fill=streetname, shape = topology)) +
  geom_point(size=5, alpha=0.7)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=Axis.2.mean-Axis.2.se, ymax=Axis.2.mean+Axis.2.se)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=Axis.1.mean-Axis.1.se, xmax=Axis.1.mean+Axis.1.se)) +
  labs(x=paste("PCoA1: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[1] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       y=paste("PCoA2: ", round(ITS_ordin_jac_Tilburg$values$Relative_eig[2] * 100, 2), "%", sep=""),
       title="Jaccard Tilburg") +
  scale_fill_manual(values=c("#88CCEE", "#CC6677", "#DDCC77", "#117733", "#332288","#AA4499","#44AA99", "#999933", "#882255", "#661100", "#6699CC", "#888888","#CB181D", "#FD8D3C","#FFFFCC")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values=c(21,22,23,24,25)) +
  guides(fill=guide_legend(override.aes=list(shape=21)))+
  mytheme

pcoa_bray_all_Tilburg_mean
ggsave("G:/My Drive/CityDeal/ITS-Sjoerd/ITS-11912/pcoa/PCOA_Tilburg_error_bars.png",width = 15, height = 10, units = "in", dpi = 600)

## And statistics
# Calculate jaccard-Curtis distance matrix
jaccard_dist_Tilburg <- phyloseq::distance(phy_Tilburg, method = "jaccard")

# PERMANOVA for individual variables
adonis_topology_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ topology, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_topology_Tilburg)
adonis_streetname_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ streetname, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_streetname_Tilburg)
adonis_covering_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ bedekking, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_covering_Tilburg)
adonis_typestraat_Tilburg <- adonis2(jaccard_dist_Tilburg ~ type_straat, data= meta_Tilburg)
print(adonis_typestraat_Tilburg)


###Permanova assumes equal dispersion amongst groups
#beta_disp <- betadisper(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta$Group)
#anova(beta_disp)  # Tests if dispersion is significantly different
#permutest(beta_disp)  # Permutation test for dispersion

PairPermITS_Tilburg <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta_Tilburg$topology, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
PairPermITS_Tilburg
PairPermITS_Tilburg$F.value
streetname_pairwise_Tilburg <- pairwise.perm.manova(jaccard_dist_Tilburg, meta_Tilburg$streetname, test="Pillai", nperm = 999, p.method = "fdr", F = TRUE, R2 = TRUE)
streetname_pairwise_Tilburg
```
